headline: New Meme Stock God Eric Jackson Affirms His Top 2026 Stock Pick
summary: Hedge fund manager Eric Jackson doubles down on Better Home & Finance as his top 2026 AI-powered mortgage stock pick.

headline: Is The Market Now Just The Mag-7? Investors Call Tech Concentration A Major Risk
summary: AAII survey confirms growing concern over concentration of mega-cap tech stocks in S&P 500. Sentiment improving but not confident.

headline: NVDA, WMT, GOOG And More: 5 Stocks That Dominated Investor Buzz This Week
summary: Retail investors talked up five hot stocks this week (Nov. 17-21) on X and Reddit’s r/WallStreetBets, driven by earnings, retail hype, AI buzz, and corporate news flow.

headline: Benzinga Bulls And Bears: Nvidia, Webull, Netflix — And Tech Stocks Face Worst Sell-Off Since April
summary: Benzinga examined the prospects for many investors' favorite stocks over the last week — here's a look at some of our top stories.

headline: Nvidia-Backed Figure AI Sued By Former Safety Engineer Claiming Dangerous Robots And Fraudulent Cuts To Safety Plan
summary: A former Figure AI safety engineer has filed a whistleblower lawsuit claiming he was fired after warning that the company's humanoid robots posed serious injury risks and that key safety measures were weakened following a $39 billion funding round, while the company denies wrongdoing.

headline: Bernie Sanders Asks Whether AI Will Really Serve Workers Or 'What Mr Musk And Mr Bezos Have In Mind' As Geoffrey Hinton Reveals The Real Risk
summary: Sen. Bernie Sanders (I-Vt) and AI pioneer Geoffrey Hinton warned that artificial intelligence could improve lives — but only if it's controlled by people whose interests extend beyond those of tech billionaires.

headline: Mark Zuckerberg, Meta Directors Reach $190 Million Settlement Over Cambridge Analytica Scandal
summary: Mark Zuckerberg and several current and former Meta directors agreed to pay $190 million to settle claims they failed to safeguard Facebook users' privacy.

headline: Nvidia Stock Dips In November, But Gene Munster Says Potential H200 Approval In China Could Supercharge Growth
summary: Nvidia's stock may be sliding in November, but analysts say a potential Trump administration reversal on H200 chip exports to China could turbocharge the company's 2025 growth far beyond current Wall Street expectations.

headline: Trump Softens Tone After 'Very Productive' Meeting With NYC Mayor-Elect Zohran Mamdani On Affordability Crisis
summary: President Donald Trump on Friday praised New York City Mayor-elect Zohran Mamdani after their White House meeting, calling it "really good, very productive."

headline: Bill Ackman Plans Pershing Square, New Fund IPO For Early 2026: Report
summary: Billionaire investor Bill Ackman is reportedly preparing a unique dual public offering for Pershing Square and another fund by early 2026.
